discovery.run_summary: Risk-on tone driven by SMH/semis (+2.5%) and NVDA (+4%) on H200 China shipment resumption; offset by defensive weakness (XLV -1.9%, XLP -1.4%) and IBM's earnings warning crushing mega-cap software/services. VIX down to ~16.4. Mid-cap movers are clustered in semi-cap equipment (sympathy with SMH) and defense.

XLV -1.9% and XLP -1.4% suggest defensive rotation out
ORCL -2.7% and MSFT -1.5% on IBM read-through re: enterprise software spend pause

discoveries.name: Onto Innovation Inc.
discoveries.setup: Semi-cap equipment sympathy with SMH/NVDA rally
discoveries.thesis: Move is consistent with SMH +2.5% and the H200-to-China restart story lifting the entire semi-cap equipment complex. Five-day run is extended but today's move alone tracks the sector tape. No company-specific catalyst in signals.
discoveries.what_confirms: Continued strength across peers (KLAC, LRCX, AMAT) and no divergent news out of Onto specifically; H200 China shipments confirmed to scale.
discoveries.what_kills: An 8-K or pre-announcement from Onto specifically that would reclassify this as company-specific news rather than sympathy; sector reverses and Onto holds up (would suggest company-specific bid).
discoveries.catalyst: SMH sector rally on NVDA H200 China shipment resumption
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals + SMH +2.5% + NVDA +4% on H200 China news; ONTO move is in line with peers.
research_pointers: Check whether ONTO has upcoming earnings date and whether the 5-day 14% run is pre-positioning
Compare ONTO move to KLAC/LRCX/AMAT today — outperformance would suggest company-specific news
Verify no analyst upgrade or conference presentation today

discoveries.name: Veeco Instruments Inc.
discoveries.setup: Small-cap semi-cap equipment sympathy with SMH rally
discoveries.thesis: VECO's move tracks the semi-cap equipment sympathy trade off NVDA H200 China news. No company-specific catalyst; magnitude in line with sector beta for a smaller-cap semi-cap name.
discoveries.what_confirms: Peers ONTO, ACLS, AEHR moving similarly; no VECO-specific news surfaces.
discoveries.what_kills: Discovery of a VECO-specific catalyst (contract win, analyst action) would reclassify; sector fade with VECO holding gains would also suggest something else.
discoveries.catalyst: Semi-cap equipment sympathy on NVDA/H200 China news
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals; SMH +2.5% baseline supports the magnitude here.
research_pointers: Verify no VECO earnings pre-announcement or analyst day
Check China exposure in VECO's revenue mix — could amplify the H200 read-through

discoveries.name: Kratos Defense & Security Solutions
discoveries.setup: Defense mid-cap ripping on flat sector (ITA ~0%) with no filing catalyst
discoveries.thesis: KTOS is up sharply while the defense ETF ITA is flat and market is broadly risk-on. Iran/Hormuz escalation news (Trump announcing blockade of Iranian shipping) is a plausible driver for defense names with drone/unmanned systems exposure, but if it were a sector-wide catalyst ITA would be up. Could be a contract award rumor, analyst action, or Iran-specific drone/tactical read-through. Cannot articulate a directional call without knowing which.
discoveries.what_confirms: Contract award announcement, 8-K after close, or specific Iran/drone tactical procurement news would clarify direction.
discoveries.what_kills: N/A — this is genuinely unclear pending catalyst discovery.
discoveries.what_to_learn: When a name outperforms a flat sector ETF by 7%+ with empty catalyst_signals, the catalyst is usually company-specific (contract/analyst/rumor) rather than macro sympathy — worth intraday news searches beyond SEC filings.
discoveries.catalyst: Unknown — possibly Iran/Hormuz escalation read-through to drone/unmanned defense; possibly contract rumor
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals but ITA flat while KTOS up ~7% strongly suggests company-specific news not yet in feed.
research_pointers: Search for KTOS contract awards or DoD announcements today
Check analyst notes / price target changes
Cross-reference with Iran escalation — Kratos drones (Valkyrie, Mako) have direct relevance

discoveries.name: PTC Therapeutics
discoveries.setup: Biotech mid-cap continuing multi-day decline with no filing catalyst, in a weak XLV tape
discoveries.thesis: PTCT is extending losses in a weak healthcare tape (XLV -1.9%), but the five-day decline suggests a specific negative catalyst earlier in the week that we don't have in signals. Without knowing whether that catalyst was a trial readout, regulatory setback, or something reversible, we can't call whether today's continued decline is capitulation (fadeable) or continued digestion of bad fundamentals.
discoveries.what_confirms: N/A — need to identify the underlying catalyst before directional call.
discoveries.what_kills: N/A — genuinely unclear pending catalyst identification.
discoveries.catalyst: Unknown — sustained multi-day decline suggests a company-specific negative event within the last week not captured in current signals
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals but five-day -12% in a mildly negative healthcare tape indicates something specific happened earlier.
research_pointers: Look up PTCT news from prior 5 trading days — trial data, regulatory, guidance
Check pipeline event calendar (Duchenne, Huntington's programs)
Review short interest and options skew

trump_signals.post_summary: Trump announces full blockade on Iranian shipping through Hormuz; drops 20% reimbursement fee in favor of Gulf state investment deals
trump_signals.note: Oil complex neutral-to-mildly-supportive (open to non-Iran traffic reduces supply shock but tension remains). Defense primes get modest tailwind on sustained tension; drone/unmanned pureplays like KTOS could benefit more if operations expand. Gulf investment 'deal' language is vague — worth watching for specific announcements.

ai_announcements.headline: New York State halts construction of all new data centers
ai_announcements.summary: NY becomes first state to pause approvals for large data centers, citing electricity, water, and local control concerns tied to AI buildout.

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: ONTO is semi metrology/inspection equipment - moves with AI capex cycle. NY moratorium is negative for hyperscaler buildout at margin, but ONTO up 4.93% and 14% over 5 days suggests move is unrelated (likely semi capex/earnings anticipation, sympathy with broader semi equipment rally). NY halt is one state and temporary.
research_pointers: ONTO move likely driven by semi cap-ex sentiment, not NY news
Check if NY moratorium has any read-through to Northeast fab construction

affected_stocks.counter_thesis: Similar to ONTO - semi equipment rallying on AI capex thesis, not on NY data center news. Move appears sector-driven.

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: None of today's moving stocks (KTOS defense, PTCT biotech, ONTO/VECO semi equipment) have clean cause-and-effect linkage to the day's AI announcements. KTOS +7% and PTCT -4% appear to be non-AI catalysts (defense contract flow, biotech-specific news). ONTO/VECO moves are more plausibly part of the ongoing AI-capex semi equipment rally than a reaction to the NY data center halt (which would be a negative, not positive, catalyst). No high-conviction AI-driven mispricings identified in this batch.
